# llms.txt Checker

> A free online checker and validator for llms.txt files, following the llmstxt.org specification. Validate by URL or by pasting text, with link checking and a live preview.

This site helps website owners verify that their /llms.txt file is correctly structured for large language models.

## Docs

- [llms.txt specification](https://llmstxt.org/): The official proposal defining the llms.txt format.
- [Checker tool](https://llmschecker.net/): The validator interface.

## Optional

- [FastHTML llms.txt example](https://www.fastht.ml/docs/llms.txt): A real-world example file referenced by the spec.
